title: Fourth assistant district attorney
doc_html:
§229. Fourth assistant district attorney

           The office of fourth assistant district attorney for the Ninth Judicial District is hereby created.

           Added by Acts 1968, No. 56, §1; Acts 1968, No. 574, §1.
doc_text:
§229.  Fourth assistant district attorney
The office of fourth assistant district attorney for the Ninth Judicial
District is hereby created.
Added by Acts 1968, No. 56, §1; Acts 1968, No. 574, §1.
